_comment: REFERENCE DATA — ENTITIES (ORGANIZATIONS ONLY) that have made a LAWFUL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE under a foreign-agent registration regime (e.g. US FARA, AU FITS, EU transparency registers). A registration is a PUBLIC ADMINISTRATIVE FILING — it is NOT an accusation, NOT proof of wrongdoing, and NOT proof that any specific content is foreign-directed. Persons are EXCLUDED. Ships EMPTY; populate from official registries (see scripts/refresh-fara.ts). Every entry MUST carry the official `registry` and a `filingUrl`.

domains: registrable domains associated with the org in the public filing
schema.date: YYYY-MM of the registration/most recent filing
